conflict: Without training anesthesia, grief and anger return; Ravi withdraws into overtime work and minimal speech.
consequence: Anika builds a nightly ritual around Maya's saved voicemails, increasing attachment to memory while delaying recovery work.
must_land_beats: Physical stillness makes intrusive memories louder.
Ravi avoids eye contact and extends work hours.
Anika replays one voicemail until she can recite it.
Notebook entries shift from reps to insomnia metrics.
objective: Survive forced rest without losing emotional control.
